title: Trial stakeholder dosage prompt/model settings for Medication Review: Dosage
description:
As a score operator, I want to trial a stricter current-medication dosage prompt for Medication Review: Dosage using only supported runtime fields, so that we can measure whether the stakeholder's proposed threshold/prompt framing improves alignment without adding unsupported configuration.

Definition of Done:
- Pull the current champion Dosage YAML locally before editing
- Update only supported fields and prompt content for the stakeholder trial
- Remove fuzzy matching from RelevantWindowsTranscriptFilter for this trial
- Run direct local validation focused on the procedure/score behavior, not CI
- Record results and next steps in Kanbus

Not included:
- Adding new runtime support for unsupported parameters
- Champion promotion or remote push unless explicitly requested
- Broader rubric changes outside the stakeholder trial wording

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Scoping stakeholder Medication Review: Dosage trial. Supported runtime fields confirmed in code: model_name, reasoning_effort, verbosity, and max_tokens. Per user direction, verbosity changes are explicitly deferred even though supported. Trial will focus on model selection, reasoning effort, max_tokens, prompt wording, and disabling fuzzy matching in RelevantWindowsTranscriptFilter.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Stakeholder clarified the trial must start from Dosage score version 21c5f5af-0a28-4036-844d-88b64898900e rather than the current champion. Re-pulling that exact version locally and treating any previously started baseline eval from champion YAML as invalid for this trial.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User clarified scope: do not run evaluations here. Create a new Dosage score version directly from source version 21c5f5af-0a28-4036-844d-88b64898900e using the stakeholder trial prompt/settings only. No local/remote evaluation work in this step.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Created new Dosage score version d730e6a8-164b-4157-b19b-47beb00d7b2e from explicit parent 21c5f5af-0a28-4036-844d-88b64898900e. Applied stakeholder trial changes only: model_name gpt-5-mini, reasoning_effort medium, max_tokens 3500, new current-active-med numeric dosage prompt wording, and disabled RelevantWindowsTranscriptFilter fuzzy matching. No evaluations were run in this step per user instruction.
